ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "research_question" TEXT /* Research question being addressed by the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., pilot, full-scale, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the phase belongs to */,
  "phase_number" INTEGER /* Number of the phase within the experiment */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "phase_start_date" TEXT /* Date the phase started */,
  "phase_end_date" TEXT /* Date the phase ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phases_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "participant_type" TEXT /* Type of participant (e.g., student, staff, external) */,
  "recruitment_method" TEXT /* Method used to recruit the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase the trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the trial involves */,
  "visual_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the visual stimulus presented */,
  "haptic_index" INTEGER /* Index of the haptic stimulus presented */,
  "haptic_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the haptic stimulus presented */,
  "percentage_perceived_smoother" REAL /* Percentage of the time the participant perceived the stimulus as smoother */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (visual or haptic) */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_filename" TEXT /* Filename of the stimulus file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_stimuli" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus used in the trial */,
  "stimulus_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the stimulus was presented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id", "stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "response" TEXT /* Participant's response to the trial */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time at which the participant responded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "researcher_role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment (e.g., principal investigator, co-investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_researchers" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher involved in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "researcher_id")
)
